name: Italian Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the beaten egg yolks to the mixture and mix well.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the flour and baking soda. Set aside.
4. In another bowl, combine the buttermilk, vanilla, coconut flakes, and nuts. Set aside.
5. Alternately add the flour mixture and buttermilk to the butter-sugar-egg yolk mixture, mixing well after each addition.
6. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form. Fold into the batter gently.
7. Pour the batter evenly into three greased and floured 8-inch cake pans.
8. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. For the frosting, beat together the softened cream cheese and butter until smooth.
10. Gradually add powdered sugar and vanilla to the cream cheese mixture, beating until well combined.
11. If desired, fold in coarsely chopped pecans and coconut flakes.
12. Allow the cake to cool completely before icing with the frosting.
